case.title: WETHERALL v. STATE ROAD COMMISSION OF WEST VIRGINIA

opinion.h: WETHERALL v. STATE ROAD COMMISSION OF WEST VIRGINIA, 382 U.S. 45 (1965)
WETHERALL ET AL. v. STATE ROAD COMMISSION OF WEST VIRGINIA ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE CIRCUIT COURT OF WEST VIRGINIA, KANAWHA COUNTY. No. 428. Decided October 25, 1965.
opinion.p: Carney M. Layne and Charles W. Yeager for appellants.
C. Donald Robertson, Attorney General of West Virginia, Philip J. Graziani, Deputy Attorney General, and C. Robert Sarver, Assistant Attorney General, for appellees.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed. Price, dba Howard Price & Co. v. State Road Commission of West Virginia, ante, p. 20.
